scripts.dev: npm run pruning:native && concurrently -k -n api,vision,web -c blue,magenta,green "npm run api:dev" "npm run vision:dev" "npm run web:dev"
scripts.api:dev:watch: if command -v cargo-watch >/dev/null 2>&1; then cargo watch -x "run -p rubiks-cube-solver-api"; else cargo run -p rubiks-cube-solver-api; fi
scripts.vision:install: python -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/python -m pip install --upgrade pip && .venv/bin/python -m pip install -r vision/requirements.txt
scripts.vision:dev: if [ -x .venv/bin/python ]; then .venv/bin/python -m uvicorn vision.app:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8790 --reload; else python -m uvicorn vision.app:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8790 --reload; fi
scripts.vision:start: if [ -x .venv/bin/python ]; then .venv/bin/python -m uvicorn vision.app:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port ${RUBIKS_VISION_PORT:-8790}; else python -m uvicorn vision.app:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port ${RUBIKS_VISION_PORT:-8790}; fi
scripts.vision:test: if [ -x .venv/bin/python ]; then .venv/bin/python -m pytest vision; else python -m pytest vision; fi
scripts.vision-ml:test: if [ -x .venv/bin/python ]; then .venv/bin/python -m pytest vision_ml; else python -m pytest vision_ml; fi
scripts.scan:label: if [ -x .venv/bin/python ]; then .venv/bin/python -m vision_ml.label_scan_session; else python -m vision_ml.label_scan_session; fi
scripts.scan:replay: if [ -x .venv/bin/python ]; then .venv/bin/python -m vision_ml.replay_scan_sessions --input vision_ml/outputs/local-sessions --output vision_ml/outputs/replay/latest --mode raw; else python -m vision_ml.replay_scan_sessions --input vision_ml/outputs/local-sessions --output vision_ml/outputs/replay/latest --mode raw; fi
scripts.scan:evaluate: if [ -x .venv/bin/python ]; then .venv/bin/python -m vision_ml.evaluate_scan_sessions --input vision_ml/outputs/replay/latest --output vision_ml/outputs/reports/latest.json --hard-cases-output vision_ml/outputs/reports/latest-hard-cases.json --fail-on-wrong-accept; else python -m vision_ml.evaluate_scan_sessions --input vision_ml/outputs/replay/latest --output vision_ml/outputs/reports/latest.json --hard-cases-output vision_ml/outputs/reports/latest-hard-cases.json --fail-on-wrong-accept; fi
scripts.scan:tile-yolo-dataset: if [ -x .venv/bin/python ]; then .venv/bin/python -m vision_ml.scan_export_tile_yolo_dataset --input vision_ml/outputs/local-sessions --output vision_ml/outputs/tile-yolo-local-stickers; else python -m vision_ml.scan_export_tile_yolo_dataset --input vision_ml/outputs/local-sessions --output vision_ml/outputs/tile-yolo-local-stickers; fi
scripts.scan:tile-yolo-roboflow-dataset: if [ -x .venv/bin/python ]; then .venv/bin/python -m vision_ml.tile_yolo_dataset --roboflow-coco-zip "$RUBIKS_ROBOFLOW_COCO_ZIP" --output vision_ml/outputs/tile-yolo-roboflow-v2; else python -m vision_ml.tile_yolo_dataset --roboflow-coco-zip "$RUBIKS_ROBOFLOW_COCO_ZIP" --output vision_ml/outputs/tile-yolo-roboflow-v2; fi
scripts.tunnel:check:prod: node scripts/check-port.mjs api ${RUBIKS_API_ADDR:-127.0.0.1:3001} && node scripts/check-port.mjs vision 127.0.0.1:${RUBIKS_VISION_PORT:-8790}
scripts.tunnel:run:prod: npm run tunnel:check:prod && npm run pruning:native && npm run build && npm run build:api && RUBIKS_VISION_TILE_DETECTOR_MODEL=vision_ml/local-models/tile-detector.onnx RUBIKS_VISION_TILE_DETECTOR_INPUT_SIZE=640 RUBIKS_VISION_TILE_DETECTOR_CONFIDENCE=0.5 concurrently -k -n api,vision,tunnel -c blue,magenta,green "npm run start" "npm run vision:start" "npm run live:tunnel"
scripts.tunnel:run:dev: npm run pruning:native && RUBIKS_VISION_TILE_DETECTOR_MODEL=vision_ml/local-models/tile-detector.onnx RUBIKS_VISION_TILE_DETECTOR_INPUT_SIZE=640 RUBIKS_VISION_TILE_DETECTOR_CONFIDENCE=0.5 VITE_ENABLE_SCAN_EXPORT=true concurrently -k -n api,vision,web,tunnel -c blue,magenta,green,cyan "npm run api:dev:watch" "npm run vision:dev" "npm run web:dev" "npm run live:tunnel"
scripts.lint: npm run ai:check && npm run lint -w @rubiks-cube-solver/web
scripts.pretest:e2e: cargo run --quiet -p cube-engine --bin generate_pruning_tables -- --output crates/cube-engine/pruning-tables --phase1-max-depth 8 --phase2-max-depth 10 && VITE_RUBIKS_API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8787 npm run build
scripts.pdb:edge: cargo run --quiet -p cube-engine --bin generate_edge_pdb -- --output-dir crates/cube-engine/pruning-tables --max-depth 6 --pattern all
scripts.pdb:edge:deep: cargo run --quiet -p cube-engine --bin generate_edge_pdb -- --output-dir crates/cube-engine/pruning-tables --max-depth 8 --pattern all
scripts.ml:solver-smoke: npm run dataset:solver && python -m ml.train_value_baseline --dataset datasets/generated/solver-training.jsonl --epochs 1 --seed 0 --output ml/outputs/solver-value-baseline --inference-repeats 1
scripts.product:gate: npm run ai:check && cargo fmt --check && cargo test && cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings && cargo run --quiet -p cube-engine --bin generate_pruning_tables -- --output crates/cube-engine/pruning-tables --phase1-max-depth 8 --phase2-max-depth 10 && npm run build && npm run lint -w @rubiks-cube-solver/web && npm run test:e2e && python -m pytest ml && python -m ml.train_value_baseline --dataset datasets/fixtures/small.jsonl --epochs 1 --seed 0 --output ml/outputs/value-baseline --inference-repeats 1 && cargo run --quiet -p cube-engine --bin solver_quality_report && cargo run --quiet -p cube-engine --bin solver_quality_report -- --hybrid-value-outputs ml/outputs/value-baseline/value_outputs.tsv && npm run solver:real-scrambles:gate
scripts.roadmap:run:long: ROADRUNNER_PROVIDER_TIMEOUT_MS=0 ROADRUNNER_VERIFY_TIMEOUT_MS=0 ROADRUNNER_AUTO_RESTART_IDLE_MS=0 ROADRUNNER_MAX_AUTO_RESTARTS_PER_STEP=0 roadrunner run --roadmap roadmap.md --max-steps 999
